arts.ttl: Preview: Real Sociedad vs. Manchester United - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Thursday's Europa League clash between Real Sociedad and Manchester United, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim says building for the future ‘more important’ than European success
arts.sum: The Europa League appears to represent Manchester United’s best chance of success this season.

arts.ttl: Why is Obi not in Man Utd's Europa League squad?
arts.sum: Manchester United forward Chido Obi is ineligible for the Europa League, but why?

arts.ttl: Xavi makes Man Utd transfer DEMAND amid Amorim sack rumours
arts.sum: De Jong and Araujo have both been tipped to join Man Utd over the past few years, but Xavi has formally requested the club to finalise a deal for the Barcelona duo if he takes over at Old Trafford, as per El Nacional. Xavi is reportedly one of several head coaches being considered by INEOS, as the Man Utd hierarchy ponder a potential managerial change this summer, and he is set to demand two key signings if he agrees a deal with the 13-time Premier League champions.

arts.ttl: Amorim 'naive' for saying Man Utd goal is to 'win Premier League' - Rooney
arts.sum: Ex-Manchester United striker Wayne Rooney says Ruben Amorim should focus on gradual improvement after the Red Devils boss said his goal was to "win the Premier League".

arts.ttl: A trophy? Or the worst Man Utd since 1974?
arts.sum: Manchester United's players will want to avoid the fate of being labelled the club's worst side since they were relegated in 1974 by winning the Europa League, journalist Samuel Luckhurst told The Football News Show.

arts.ttl: Why Europa League progression is 'so important' for Man Utd & Spurs
arts.sum: Football finance expert, Professor Rob Wilson, takes a look at the effects of progression in the Europa League and lays out the situation for Manchester United and Tottenham Hotspur ahead of their last-16 ties.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim makes very bold statement that Manchester United fans may not agree with
arts.sum: Manchester United's only realistic chance of silverware this season is in the Europa League, with the Red Devils sitting 14th in the Premier League table - but Ruben Amorim insists building for the future is "more important"

arts.ttl: Man United boss Ruben Amorim names the objective that is 'more important' than winning the Europa League
arts.sum: United sit 14th in the Premier League and are out of the FA Cup, meaning the continent's second tier competition offers their only realistic hope of silverware and European qualification.

arts.ttl: Report: Man United reopen talks over key contract, Ruben Amorim pushing for deal
arts.sum: Manchester United have reopened negotiations with Kobbie Mainoo over a new contract as they look to secure his future at Old Trafford, according to reports. The 19-year-old midfielder, who is currently on a £20,000-a-week deal until 2027, has been in prolonged discussions with the club over improved terms.
